text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa and I are on our way back from a
day out, when...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: It's already dark. I guess we took it a little too easy today.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
We've got an early day tomorrow too, Trainer.
Let's call it as soon as we get ba—

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Rayos!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I totally forgot I have homework due tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
On top of that, I forgot the handout in the
classroom!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: This is the third time I've forgotten my homework!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
My teacher said I'll have to write an extra report
if I forget again! Ughhh!
choice_data_list: Let's go get the handout right now.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Really?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! Thank youuu! Let's go get it right
away!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hm... The lights are on, but it's still dark.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
N-n-no way! I've got my mask on, so there's
nothin' to be afraid of!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I don't believe in ghosts or anything! It's just...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I watched a horror movie last night with Grass and
everyone, and...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
There was an old nobleman attacking people with
an axe to get revenge.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
And it was set at a school at night... Ugh, I'd be
fine if it was just a ghost!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Well, it wouldn't be a big deal using all my
techniques on a ghost!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But I can't just go all out on an amateur with my
wrestling moves!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
So basically, I can't fight! Maybe it'd be okay if
we were talking about a strong Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't quite understand her logic, but I don't ask
any more questions.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Well, we can't just sit around here. Let's get to
the classroom!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ugh... It's so dark...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The lights along the hall are all out.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I-I'm El Condor Pasa... the strongest racer...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I'm not afraid of anything!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For not being afraid of anything, she seems to be
looking around pretty frantically.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Th-the old scaredy-cat El is gone!
choice_data_list:
You're the world's strongest and the world's
fastest!
Look out behind you! He's got an axe!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ah! Trainer!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Th-that's right! Fastest in the world, with nerves
of steel, and quick as lightning!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: The name's El Condor Pasaaa!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: No one can keep up, no matter who they are!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
If things get hairy, I can definitely escape. Even if
I have to carry you, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Thanks, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems full of motivation now. El Condor Pasa
gets her papers and we leave without any trouble.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Madre mía! Is it the old nobleman?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'm not afraid! Nooot at all! Not even of old
noblemen with axes!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I'm El, the world's strongest racer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa runs away at breakneck speed,
but...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Where am I? Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In her panic, she ends up getting lost somewhere
in the school.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A while later, she finds her way back...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'm so tired... of running... I'm not even scared
anymore...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Please, don't disappear without saying anything
again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rather than remind her that she's the one who ran off, I comfort El Condor Pasa.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the plus side, it seems like the run turned out
to be a good bit of training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, an exhausted El Condor Pasa manages
to finish her homework and avoids having to write
an extra report.
